name: prd-to-design
description: Convert Markdown PRDs into design briefs, generated UI concepts, and MD3 HTML design change reports.

interface.shortDescription: Turn PRDs into design briefs and reports.
interface.longDescription: PRD to Design helps Codex read Markdown PRDs, extract design-impacting work, analyze current Figma or screenshot context, generate UI concept images, and render a Chinese MD3-style HTML design change report.
defaultPrompt: Analyze a Markdown PRD and create a design change report.
Turn this PRD into a Chinese MD3 HTML design report.
